title: CS Graffiti
description: Adds the graffiti mechanics from CS 1.6/CS:S
body:
This mod adds the graffiti mechanics from CS 1.6/CS:S
Yes, that's all the description. I have nothing more to say

Instructions to use:

The main element of this mod is the "/csgraf" command
Just paste the image path into the command (without quotes) (Example: " /csgraf "C:\Users\User\Pictures\Picture1.png" ")
Point at the block where you want to place the graffiti and click BIND (Read below)
Done! (It seems to be working... At least it works for me...)

Main key bind: G

Arguments of command (or Sub-commands):

1) For version 1.0.0:
"/csgraf size <number> (Max: 8) <path to file>" - Makes a graffiti with a size of NUMBER by NUMBER (Example: If the number is 2, then the graffiti will be 2 by 2 blocks)
"/csgraf sound <path to sound>" - Puts sound on graffiti drawing (ONLY CLIENT)


2) For version 1.1.0:
"/csgraf size <number> (Max: 1024) " - Changes the ratio of the graffiti image pixel to the block pixel (Example: If the NUMBER is 512 (Default: 256), then 1 graffiti pixel will be equal to 1/512 of a block pixel)
"/csgraf sound <path to sound>" - Puts sound on graffiti drawing (ONLY CLIENT)
"/csgraf reset " - Restores the size value
"/csgraf cd/cooldown <ticks> (Max: 72000 ticks (or 1 hour))" - restricts the installation of graffiti (ONLY THE SERVER OWNER CAN USE IT) (Bug: When a player who does not have enough permissions uses this command, they will receive a message indicating that the command was successfully executed, but this is not the case.)

 

Supported formats:
For graffiti - png, jpg, gif
For sound - wav, ogg
